completed_steps.summary: Classified repository as monolith with 1 part; part app detected as web via package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.mjs, app/, components/, lib/, public/
Inventoried 2 existing documentation artifacts: README.md and CODE_REVIEW_SUMMARY.md
Captured stack summary: Next.js 16.2.6, React 19, TypeScript 5.7.3, Tailwind CSS 4.2, shadcn/ui/Radix UI, Vercel Analytics
Completed conditional analysis for web app; confirmed no first-party API routes or DB models in active source and noted static data-driven UI architecture
Wrote source tree analysis covering app/, components/, components/ui/, lib/, public/, docs/, _bmad/, .vercel/
Documented dev/deployment flow from package.json, next.config.mjs, README.md, .vercel/project.json, and env var names without exposing values
Generated architecture.md for single-part frontend monolith
Generated supporting docs: project-overview.md, component-inventory.md, development-guide.md, deployment-guide.md, existing-documentation-inventory.md, api-contracts.md, data-models.md
Generated master docs index.md for AI retrieval

findings.project_classification: Monolith web application built with Next.js App Router
findings.technology_stack: Next.js 16.2.6 on React 19 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Radix UI
findings.scan_notes: Contact form is simulated only; no app/api routes or database models detected in active frontend implementation

resume_instructions: Resume from step_11 to review or extend generated docs
